Sensor Scramblers.name: Sensor Scramblers
Sensor Scramblers.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 5

All creatures within 10 mètres of you become undetectable to electronic sensors and cameras for the next 10 minutes. Anything these creatures are wearing or carrying is also undetectable, so long as it's on la créature's person. The creatures are still visible to regular vision.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a repos long before you can use it again.

Wrist-Mounted Grappling Hook.name: Wrist-Mounted Grappling Hook
Wrist-Mounted Grappling Hook.description:
You craft a wrist-mounted grappling hook weapon attached to a tightly coiled cord. With this contraption, you can make a attaque d'arme à distance with a range of 30/60. En cas de contacter, it deals [[/r 1d4]] kinetic dégâts. This attack can target a surface, object, or creature.

A creature struck by this attack is impaled by the hook. As an action, a creature can attempt to remove the hook. Removing the hook requires a test de Force. While the hook is stuck in la cible, you are connected to la cible by a 60 foot cable.

While the hook is deployed, you can use your action bonus to activate the reel, pulling yourpersonnelle to the location if la cible is your size or larger. A creature or object smaller than you is pulled to you. Alternatively, you can opt to release the cable (no action required).

Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you recover and reinsert the hook as an action.

Explosive Shot.name: Explosive Shot
Explosive Shot.description:
You fire a shot set to explode on impact. The shot detonates after your attack. Immediately after the shot hits la créature, la cible and all other creatures within 10 mètres of it take [[/r 2d6]] fire dégâts each.

The fire dégâts increases to [[/r 4d6]] when you reach niveau 18 in this class.

Universal Language.name: Universal Language
Universal Language.description: Vous pouvez communiquer des idées simples avec n'importe quelle créature ayant un score d'Intelligence de 6 ou plus grâce à des expressions et des gestes de base.

Aura of Conquest.name: Aura of Conquest
Aura of Conquest.description: Whenever a creature who is effrayé of you starts its turn within 5 mètres of you, its gains 4 slowed niveaus and takes psychic dégâts equal to half your guardian niveau.

Shock Absorber.name: Shock Absorber
Shock Absorber.description: You add a reclamation device to your modified weapon to gather energy from the surroundings when it is present. While wielding your modified weapon, you can cast the absorb energy pouvoir technique and the power's extra dégâts applies to both melee and attaque d'arme à distances.

Shield Amplifier.name: Shield Amplifier
Shield Amplifier.description:
Prerequisite: Shield Generator

You modify your shield generator to project outward. As a action bonus you can amplify your shield jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. Each creature within 5 mètres of you gains a bonus to AC equal to your shield's bonus.

You can use this feature twice. You gain an additional use at 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. You regain any expended uses when you finish a repos long.

Long Range Comms.name: Communications longue portée
Long Range Comms.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 5

You can cast the Sending power, targeting a creature whose frequency is in your wristpad, without using tech points. A willing creature can use its action to register its comm frequency on your device, which can contain a number of frequencies equal to your bonus de maîtrise.

As an action, you can remove a frequency on the device by deleting it.

Tech Amateur.name: Tech Amateur
Tech Amateur.description:
Vous apprenez et pouvez lancer une technique de pouvoir de 1er niveau une fois par repos. Votre capacité de techcasting est l’Intelligence. Vous devez utiliser un bracelet pour ce pouvoir.

Vous pouvez sélectionner cette découverte plusieurs fois. À chaque fois, vous devez choisir une puissance différente.

Withercasting Dynamics.name: Withercasting Dynamics
Withercasting Dynamics.description:
Prérequis : niveau 5

En utilisant votre poignet comme focus technologique, vous gagnez un bonus de +1 à la sauvegarde technologique DD des pouvoirs que vous lancez qui nécessitent un jet de sauvegarde de Sagesse ou de Charisme. Ce bonus passe à +2 au niveau 9 et +3 au niveau 13.

Piercing Shot.name: Piercing Shot
Piercing Shot.description:
You enhance your shot with armor-piercing properties. When you use this option, you don't make an attack roll for the attack. Instead, the shot shoots forward in a line, which is 1 foot wide and 30 mètres long, before disappearing. The shot passes through objects, ignoring cover. Each creature in that line must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes dégâts as if it were hit by the shot, plus an extra [[/r 1d6]] dégâts of the weapon's type. On a successful sauvegarde, a target takes half as much dégâts.

The extra dégâts increases to [[/r 2d6]] when you reach niveau 18 in this class.

Resource Appropriation.name: Resource Appropriation
Resource Appropriation.description:
Prérequis : niveau 11

Si vous réduisez la cible de votre fonction Analyse Critique à 0 point de vie, et qu'il lui reste des points techniques, vous pouvez choisir de gagner tous les points techniques qui lui restent. Vos points techniques actuels ne peuvent pas dépasser votre maximum de points techniques.

Une fois que vous avez utilisé cette fonctionnalité, vous devez terminer un court métrage ou une mise en pension bien avant de pouvoir l'utiliser à nouveau.

Mental Prowess.name: Mental Prowess
Mental Prowess.description: When you make a Strength (Athletics) or Dexterity (Acrobatics) check to grapple a creature or break out of a grapple, net, and other restraining equipment, you can use your Critical Analysis modificateur de caractéristique instead of Strength or Dexterity.

Refocused Subroutine.name: Refocused Subroutine
Refocused Subroutine.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 5

When you are forced to make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde to maintain concentration on a power you can use your réaction and spend 2 tech points to automatically succeed on the jet de sauvegarde.

You can use Refocused Subroutine even if you have already used a different Subroutine modification during the casting of the power.

Advanced Grounding System.name: Advanced Grounding System
Advanced Grounding System.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 13, Prototype Grounding System

While wearing your gadgeteer harness you have immunity to lightning dégâts.

Advanced Jamming Phased Array.name: Advanced Jamming Phased Array
Advanced Jamming Phased Array.description:
Prérequis : niveau 15, Prototype Jamming Phased Array

Pendant que votre champ de brouillage est actif, toute créature hostile présente dans le champ doit effectuer un jet de sauvegarde de Constitution à la fin de chacun de ses tours pour maintenir sa concentration sur le champ de brouillage. puissance.

Thirst for Justice.name: Soif de justice
Thirst for Justice.description: Lorsque vous réduisez une créature hostile à 0 point de vie, mais ne la tuez pas sur le coup, vous gagnez des points de vie temporaires égaux à votre niveau d'érudit, qui durent 1 minute.

Advanced Remote Healer.name: Advanced Remote Healer
Advanced Remote Healer.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 11

The range of your Remote Healer feature increases to 60 mètres.

Ideal of the Hunter.name: Idéal du chasseur
Ideal of the Hunter.description:
You gain darkvision out to a range of 60 mètres. If you already have darkvision, this ideal increases its range by 30 mètres.

De plus, as a action bonus, you can manifest this ideal in a brief surge of energy. For the next minute, you can see normally in enhanced darkness, and you gain blindsight to 10 mètres.

It Belongs in a Museum.name: It Belongs in a Museum
It Belongs in a Museum.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 9

Your knowledge of antiquities is unparalleled. When you make an Intelligence (Lore) check or an test de caractéristique with your archaeologist kit, you may treat any roll of a 9 or lower as a 10.

Elemental Ingenuity.name: Elemental Ingenuity
Elemental Ingenuity.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 11

When you cast a power that deals fire, lightning, or cold dégâts, you can spend 1 additional tech point and choose to swap the type de dégâts to fire, lightning, or cold dégâts.

Explorer's Exploit.name: Explorer's Exploit
Explorer's Exploit.description: You can hold your breath twice as long as you are normally able to, and take half as much dégâts from fall dégâts.

Mighty Prowess Enabler.name: Mighty Prowess Enabler
Mighty Prowess Enabler.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 5, Brawny Arm Prothesis

The Strength score of your Brawny Arm Prosthesis increases by 2. De plus, you are considered proficient with any weapon you wield with this arm. If the weapon requires two hands to use, and you are not already proficient with it, you only add half your bonus de maîtrise to attack rolls you make with it, unless you wield it with two of these arms.

Vous pouvez choisir this modification multiple times, but only once per arm.

Warden's Routine.name: Warden's Routine
Warden's Routine.description: At the start of each of your turns, vous pouvez choisir to gain a crawling, climbing, and swimming speed equal to your walking speed jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. Alternatively, vous pouvez choisir to extend this benefit to allies within 5 mètres of you.

Cunning Strategist.name: Cunning Strategist
Cunning Strategist.description:
Choose two from the following. You can perform each of the chosen options with your action bonus, instead of your action:

  • Applying poison
  • Dash
  • Disengage
  • Guard
  • Help
  • Hide
  • Search
  • Throwing grenades and setting mines
  • While mounted on a controlled beast, having your beast make a single attaque au corps à corps against a creature within its reach
  • While mounted on a vehicle, taking a vehicle action (you can't take the same action twice in one turn)

Flashlight Attachment.name: Flashlight Attachment
Flashlight Attachment.description: You affix a targeted light to your electronic warfare platform. As a action bonus, you can toggle the light on or off. While on, your electronic warfare platform sheds bright light in a cône de 18 mètres.

Expanded Chemicals: Cryogenics.name: Expanded Chemicals: Cryogenics
Expanded Chemicals: Cryogenics.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 5

You add additional chemicals to your modified biochemist's pack. When you deal cold dégâts with a pouvoir technique or class feature, you can use your Biochemist's Touch and Potent Mixture features.

De plus, when a creature fails their Constitution jet de sauvegarde against your Noxious Mixtures feature, vous pouvez choisir to instead deal cold dégâts. If you do so, it gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. You can use this feature three times. You gain an additional use at 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a short or repos long.

Health Food.name: Health Food
Health Food.description: At the end of a short or repos long you may expend a dé de supériorité and choose a number of friendly creatures up to your maneuver modificateur (minimum of one), if they ate food you prepared. Each creature gains a number of points de vie temporaires equal to twice the number you roll on the dé de supériorité. This maneuver has no effect on droids or constructs.

Climbing Gloves.name: Climbing Gloves
Climbing Gloves.description: You craft a set of gloves with a powerful assisted grip. While wearing these gloves, you have a climbing speed of 20 mètres, and you have avantage on Strength jet de sauvegardes and Strength (Athletics) checks that involve climbing.

Shocking Oscillator.name: Shocking Oscillator
Shocking Oscillator.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 9, Vibroweapon

Quand vous contactez avec the weapon, you can create an electronic burst. Each creature in a cône de 4,5 mètres centered on la créature you hit must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, taking [[/r 1d8]] lightning dégâts on a failed sauvegarde or half as much on a successful one.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a repos long before you can use it again.

Vow of the Sentry.name: Vœu de la sentinelle
Vow of the Sentry.description: You gain maîtrise in light and medium armor. De plus, you can now gain the benefits of your Martial Arts and Unarmored Movement features while wearing light or medium armor as long as you are not wielding a shield.

Anti-Dazzle Ocular Implant.name: Anti-Dazzle Ocular Implant
Anti-Dazzle Ocular Implant.description:
This augmentation replaces your eyes.

You are immune to the aveuglé condition, and you can enable or disable your ability to see anytime. De plus, your eyes are equipped with a holorecorder device. You can perfectly recall anything you've seen in the last 7 days.

Versatile Explorer.name: Versatile Explorer
Versatile Explorer.description: You can hold your breath twice as long as you are normally able to, and take half as much dégâts from fall dégâts.

Resolute.name: Resolute
Resolute.description: Lorsque vous effectuez un jet de sauvegarde pour résister aux effets de charme et de peur, vous pouvez ajouter votre modificateur d'Intelligence au jet.

Vitamins.name: Vitamins
Vitamins.description: At the end of a short or repos long you may expend a dé de supériorité and choose a number of friendly creatures up to your maneuver modificateur (minimum of one), if they ate food you prepared. Each creature gains maîtrise in Constitution jet de sauvegardes until the end of their next short or repos long. If a creature was already proficient in Constitution jet de sauvegardes, they instead become proficient in a jet de sauvegarde de votre choix. This maneuver has no effect on droids or constructs.

Chemical Counteragents.name: Chemical Counteragents
Chemical Counteragents.description:
You may choose one type of dégâts that benefits from your Biochemist's Touch and Potent Mixtures features. While wearing your modified biochemist's pack you have resistance to that type of dégâts.

You can select this modification multiple times. Each time you do so, you must choose a different type de dégâts.

Prototype Brightsaber.name: Prototype Brightsaber
Prototype Brightsaber.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 7, Brightsaber Conversion

You fine tune your brightsaber. When you activate this conversion to alter the properties of your lightweapon, you can use your action bonus to attempt to blind la cible of the attack. The creature must succeed on a Constitution jet de sauvegarde or be aveuglé.

Greatsaber Array.name: Greatsaber Array
Greatsaber Array.description: You augment the configuration of your modified lightsaber. Your modified lightsaber gains the two-handed property, and it's dégâts die increases to [[/r 1d12]].

Magnetic-Lock Grip.name: Magnetic-Lock Grip
Magnetic-Lock Grip.description: You insert a series of magnetically charged grips into your modified lightsaber's hilt. While wielding your modified lightsaber, you have avantage on test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes made to disarm or avoid being disarmed.

Extended Beam.name: Extended Beam
Extended Beam.description: Vous installez une série d'amplificateurs de focalisation de faisceau dans votre sabre laser modifié. Votre sabre laser modifié acquiert la propriété de portée.

Shocking Hook.name: Shocking Hook
Shocking Hook.description:
Prérequis : niveau 9, grappin monté sur poignet

Après avoir contacté une créature avec votre grappin, vous pouvez utiliser la connexion pour délivrer une technique de pouvoir à volonté. En bonus d'action, vous pouvez lancer une technique de pouvoir à volonté sur la cible avec une portée de contact. Si le pouvoir nécessite un jet d'attaque, vous avez un avantage. Si la cible nécessite un jet de sauvegarde, la cible a un désavantage.

Une fois que vous avez utilisé cette fonctionnalité, vous ne pouvez plus l'utiliser tant que vous n'avez pas récupéré le hook.

Overload Shield.name: Overload Shield
Overload Shield.description:
Prerequisite: Shield Generator

You modify your shield generator to overload. As an action you can overload your shield. Each Large or smaller creature within 5 mètres of you must make a Dexterity or Strength jet de sauvegarde (their choice). On a failed sauvegarde, they are pushed back 5 mètres and knocked à terre.

You can use this feature twice. You gain an additional use at 5th, 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. You regain any expended uses when you finish a repos long.

Hallucinogen Shot.name: Hallucinogen Shot
Hallucinogen Shot.description:
You enhance your shot with hallucinogenic chemicals. The creature hit by the shot takes an extra [[/r 2d6]] psychic dégâts, and it must succeed on a Wisdom jet de sauvegarde or be unable to see anything farther than 5 mètres away jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

The psychic dégâts increases to [[/r 4d6]] when you reach niveau 18 in this class.

Auto-Injection Regenerator.name: Auto-Injection Regenerator
Auto-Injection Regenerator.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 5

You install a special kolto injector into your gadgeteer harness that can inject you with kolto in response to pain. When you take dégâts, you can use your réaction and expend a Hit Die to regain health as long as the dégâts would not reduce your points de vie to 0.

Adegan Crystal.name: Adegan Crystal
Adegan Crystal.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 5

You gain a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss made with this weapon. This bonus increases to +2 at niveau 9 and +3 at niveau 13.

Strider's Routine.name: Strider's Routine
Strider's Routine.description: At the start of each of your turns, vous pouvez choisir to have each slowed niveau only reduce your speed by 5 mètres, unless it would reduce your speed to 0 jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour. Alternatively, vous pouvez choisir to extend this benefit to allies within 5 mètres of you.

Running on Fumes.name: Running on Fumes
Running on Fumes.description: You only need 3 hours of sleep during a repos long to gain its benefits, instead of 6. De plus, if your repos long would be interrupted, you only need to complete the repos long instead of restarting it to gain its benefits. Lastly, you have avantage on jet de sauvegardes against épuisement.

Returning Weapon.name: Arme de retour
Returning Weapon.description: Vous installez une chaîne rétractable dans la poignée de votre sabre laser modifié. Votre sabre laser modifié acquiert la propriété de lancer avec une portée de 20/60, et lorsque vous lancez l'arme, elle revient immédiatement dans votre main.

Commander's Armor.name: Armure de commandant
Commander's Armor.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 5

You gain maîtrise in medium armor. If you are already proficient in medium armor, you instead gain maîtrise in heavy armor.

Vow of Freedom.name: Vow of Freedom
Vow of Freedom.description: Vous ignorez les terrains difficiles non améliorés, et lorsque vous souhaitez utiliser votre action pour vous libérer d'un effet qui vous saisit ou vous retient, vous pouvez utiliser votre bonus d'action à la place.

Brawny Arm Prosthesis.name: Brawny Arm Prosthesis
Brawny Arm Prosthesis.description:
This augmentation replaces an arm.

When you make an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength using only this arm, your Strength score is treated as 15. When you make an test de caractéristique, attack roll, or jet de sauvegarde using Strength using more than just this arm, you take the average of the arm's Strength score and your own.

Vous pouvez choisir this modification multiple times.

Nighthawk Ocular Implant.name: Nighthawk Ocular Implant
Nighthawk Ocular Implant.description:
This augmentation replaces your eyes.

You can activate or deactivate this implant as a action bonus. While active, you gain darkvision to a range of 120 mètres.

Advanced Power Fist.name: Poing de puissance avancé
Advanced Power Fist.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 11, Prototype Power Fist

You further modify your modified armor's gauntlet with increased reinforcement and weight. Your modified armor's unarmed strike deals [[/r 1d8]] kinetic dégâts. De plus, your critical hit range with your unarmed strikes increases by 1.

Steady Eye.name: Steady Eye
Steady Eye.description:
Prérequis : niveau 9

À votre tour, vous pouvez réduire votre vitesse de moitié pour obtenir un avantage sur les tests de Sagesse (Perception) ou d'Intelligence (Enquête) jusqu'à la fin du tour. Vous ne pouvez pas utiliser cette fonctionnalité si vous avez bougé de plus de la moitié de votre vitesse ce tour-ci.

Evaluation scanner.name: Evaluation scanner
Evaluation scanner.description: Vous pouvez lancer le pouvoir Analyze sans utiliser de points techniques. Si vous l'utilisez dans un but technologique, vous apprenez quelles techniques de pouvoir, le cas échéant, s'y trouvent.

Force Combat Knowledge.name: Force Combat Knowledge
Force Combat Knowledge.description: Your research into Jedi and Sith combat techniques has allowed you to gain maîtrise in simple lightweapons. De plus, you gain knowledge of one lightsaber form de votre choix.

Fate's Exploit.name: Fate's Exploit
Fate's Exploit.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 7

When you finish a short or repos long, roll a [[/r d20]] and record the number rolled. Once before your next short or repos long, you can replace any attack roll, jet de sauvegarde, or test de caractéristique made by you or a creature within 5 mètres of you with this roll. You must choose to do so before the roll.

The Years and the Mileage.name: Les années et le kilométrage
The Years and the Mileage.description: Vos études archéologiques vous ont emmené à travers la galaxie. Tant que vous êtes la cible de votre fonction d'analyse critique, vous pouvez utiliser votre capacité universelle d'incantation de force au lieu de la sagesse lorsque vous effectuez des tests de perspicacité ou de survie.

Expanded Magazine.name: Expanded Magazine
Expanded Magazine.description:
Prérequis : Blaster

Votre arme modifiée peut être rechargée plus efficacement. Vous pouvez recharger votre arme modifiée une fois sans utiliser d'action. Vous ne pouvez plus utiliser cette fonctionnalité tant que vous n'avez pas rechargé l'arme avec une action.

Unerring Eye.name: Unerring Eye
Unerring Eye.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 15

You can see the true form of any shapechanger or creature concealed by illusion while la créature is within 30 mètres of you and within line of sight.

Expanded Chemicals: Combustibles.name: Expanded Chemicals: Combustibles
Expanded Chemicals: Combustibles.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 5

You add additional chemicals to your modified biochemist's pack. When you deal fire dégâts with a pouvoir technique or class feature, you can use your Biochemist's Touch and Potent Mixture features.

De plus, when a creature fails their Dexterity jet de sauvegarde against your Corrosive Mixtures feature, vous pouvez choisir to instead deal fire dégâts. If you do so, chaque créature within 5 mètres of la cible takes fire dégâts equal to your Intelligence modificateur. You can use this feature three times. You gain an additional use at 9th, 13th, and niveau 17. Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a short or repos long.

Hardy Torso Prosthesis.name: Hardy Torso Prosthesis
Hardy Torso Prosthesis.description:
Cette augmentation remplace votre torse.

Votre score de Constitution devient 13. De plus, vous avez un avantage sur les jets de sauvegardes contre le poison.

Ideal of the Steadfast.name: Idéal des inébranlables
Ideal of the Steadfast.description:
When you would make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps roll, you can instead force la cible to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with the weapon). If you would have avantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has disavantage on their jet de sauvegarde, and if you would have disavantage on your attack roll, la créature instead has avantage on their jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, la cible takes normal weapon dégâts and is subjected to any additional effects that would occur on a hit.

De plus, as a action bonus, you can manifest this ideal in a brief surge of energy. For the next minute, when a creature succeeds on the jet de sauvegarde, they take half the normal weapon dégâts, and when a creature rolls a 1 on the jet de sauvegarde, they treat the dégâts as if you had rolled the maximum.

Vow of the Open Mind.name: Vœu d'ouverture d'esprit
Vow of the Open Mind.description: You gain maîtrise in a skill de votre choix. De plus, you can spend 1 focus point and 10 minutes meditating on a skill in which you are proficient. If you do so, quand vous faites an test de caractéristique with the chosen skill, you can add your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur to the check. You can only have one instance of this feature active at a time.

Predatory Senses.name: Predatory Senses
Predatory Senses.description: You have darkvision out to 60 mètres. If you already have darkvision, its range instead increases by 30 mètres. When you undergo your mutagenic transformation, you gain avantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell for the duration. De plus, you can track creatures that have left a scent in the last 24 hours.

Tomb of the Ancients.name: Tombeau des Anciens
Tomb of the Ancients.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 5

As a réaction when you take dégâts, you can entomb yourpersonnelle in the Force jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. For the duration, you have resistance to the triggering dégâts, you gain points de vie temporaires equal to [[/r 1d10]] + your universal forcecasting modificateur de caractéristique + your scholar niveau to potentially absorb the attack, and your speed is reduced to 0.

Once you've used this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a short or repos long.

Vector Amplifier.name: Vector Amplifier
Vector Amplifier.description:
Prérequis : niveau 5

En utilisant votre corps comme focus technologique, vous gagnez un bonus de +1 aux jets d'attaque technologique en mêlée. Ce bonus passe à +2 au niveau 9 et +3 au niveau 13.

Athletic.name: Athletic
Athletic.description: Vous avez le choix entre une vitesse de montée, de rampement ou de nage égale à votre vitesse de marche.

Advanced Support Enhancement.name: Advanced Support Enhancement
Advanced Support Enhancement.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 15, Prototype Support Enhancement

While playing your Song of Support, allies add your Intelligence modificateur to their death jet de sauvegardes (minimum of +1). If this amount would increase the roll of the [[/r d20]] to 20 or greater, la créature regains 1 point de vie.

Weapon Integration.name: Intégration des armes
Weapon Integration.description: Vous pouvez intégrer une seule arme ne pesant pas plus de 8 lb dans votre harnais gadgeteer. Une fois intégrée, cette arme acquiert les propriétés cachées et fixes.

Learner's Exploit.name: Learner's Exploit
Learner's Exploit.description:
You gain maîtrise in a skill and a tool, or two tools.

You can select this exploit multiple times, each time choosing a new skill and a tool, or two new tools.

Cryo Amplifier, Mk III.name: Cryo Amplifier, Mk III
Cryo Amplifier, Mk III.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 13, Cryo Amplifier, Mk II

When you expend a use of your Cryo Amplifier, Mk II, when la créature fails Constitution jet de sauvegarde it instead becomes entravé jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour.

Carbonite Shot.name: Carbonite Shot
Carbonite Shot.description:
When this shot strikes its target, shards of carbonite wrap around la cible. The creature hit by the shot takes an extra [[/r 2d6]] cold dégâts, it gains 1 slowed niveau, and it takes [[/r 2d6]] kinetic dégâts the first time on each turn it moves 1 foot or more without teleporting. La cible or any creature that can reach it can use its action to remove the carbonite with a successful Strength (Athletics) check against your Special Ammunition sauvegarde DD. Otherwise, the carbonite lasts pendant 1 minute or until you use this option again.

The cold dégâts and kinetic dégâts both increase to [[/r 4d6]] when you reach niveau 18 in this class.

Explosive Amplifier.name: Explosive Amplifier
Explosive Amplifier.description:
You integrate a booster in your wristpad that enhances your pouvoir techniques that deal fire dégâts. While wielding this amplifier, when a creature takes fire dégâts from a pouvoir technique you cast, vous pouvez choisir to deal additional fire dégâts equal to your Intelligence modificateur.

You can use this amplifier un nombre de fois égal à your Intelligence modificateur (a minimum of once). Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a short or repos long.

Advanced Battle Enhancement.name: Advanced Battle Enhancement
Advanced Battle Enhancement.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 15, Prototype Battle Enhancement

While playing your Song of Battle, your pouvoir techniques and class features ignore resistance to sonic dégâts, and immunity to sonic dégâts is instead treated as resistance from any creature within range of your song that can hear you.

De plus, quand vous utilisez your Battle Song Enhancement feature, you create a fourth burst.

Distant Power.name: Puissance lointaine
Distant Power.description:
When you cast a power that has a range of 5 mètres or greater, you can spend 1 additional point de Force to double the range of the power.

Alternatively, when you cast a power that has a range of contact, you can spend 1 additional point de Force to make the range of the power 30 mètres.

Iridonian Grav-lev Hand.name: Iridonian Grav-lev Hand
Iridonian Grav-lev Hand.description:
This augmentation replaces a hand.

Your unarmed strikes with this arm deal [[/r 1d4]] ion dégâts, and your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift doubles. De plus, you deal double dégâts to energy-based structures with your unarmed strikes.

Vous pouvez choisir this modification multiple times.

Explosive Amplifier, Mk II.name: Explosive Amplifier, Mk II
Explosive Amplifier, Mk II.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 7, Explosive Amplifier

When you deal dégâts to a creature with this amplifier, it becomes ignited (your techcasting modificateur de caractéristique) until the start of it's next turn.

You can use this feature un nombre de fois égal à your Intelligence modificateur (minimum of 1). Vous regagnez tous expended uses when you complete a repos long.

Advanced Biotic Amplifier.name: Advanced Biotic Amplifier
Advanced Biotic Amplifier.description:
Prérequis : niveau 15, prototype d'amplificateur biotique

Vous affinez davantage votre amplificateur biotique. En utilisant cet amplificateur, lorsqu'une créature gagne des points de vie temporaires grâce à votre amplificateur biotique, elle en gagne quatre fois plus. Ce montant ne peut excéder le nombre de points de vie récupérés.

The More the Merrier.name: Plus on est de fous, plus on est de fous
The More the Merrier.description:
Prerequisite: Size Small or smaller beast

Rather than a single beast companion, you instead control multiple beasts that function as a swarm. Your beast companion gains the following benefits:

  • Its effective size increases by two categories (from Tiny to Medium or Small to Large).
  • Its points de vie increase by an amount equal to twice its niveau + 2.
  • It can only be mounted by creatures at least three size categories smaller than it, instead of one.
  • It can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and it can move through any opening large enough for a creature two size categories smaller than it.
  • While it is above half its point de vie maximum, when it takes the Attack action, it can make an additional attack. If la créature has the Extra Attack feature, this attack is in addition to the attack granted by that feature.

Autothrusters.name: Autothrusters
Autothrusters.description:
Prérequis : Jet Pack

Vous pouvez effectuer les actions Dash et Désengagement comme bonus d'action pendant que votre jet pack est actif.

Venomous Oscillator.name: Venomous Oscillator
Venomous Oscillator.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 9, Vibroweapon

As a action bonus, you can coat your weapon in a thin layer of poison pendant 1 minute. The next time you hit with the weapon, la créature must make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde against your tech sauvegarde DD. On a failed sauvegarde, a creature takes [[/r 1d10]] poison dégâts and becomes empoisonné pendant 1 minute.

Once you've used this feature, you must complete a repos long before you can use it again.

Twinned Subroutine.name: Twinned Subroutine
Twinned Subroutine.description:
Prérequis : niveau 5

Lorsque vous lancez un pouvoir qui ne peut avoir qu'une cible et n'a pas de portée personnelle, vous pouvez dépenser un nombre de points technologiques supplémentaires égal au niveau du pouvoir pour choisir une deuxième cible à portée avec le même pouvoir (1 technologie point si le pouvoir est à volonté).

Vous ne pouvez utiliser qu'une seule modification de sous-programme sur un pouvoir lorsque vous le lancez, sauf indication contraire.

Sentry Turret.name: Sentry Turret
Sentry Turret.description:
You learn how to craft small sentry turrets shaped like globes that can adhere to any surface. As an action or action bonus (your choice), you can throw a sentry to a point you can see within range (30 mètres + your Strength modificateur x 5). At the end of each of your turns, a deployed sentry automatically targets a hostile creature within 10 mètres of it. If multiple targets are available, one is chosen at random. La cible must make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde. On a failed sauvegarde, it takes [[/r 1d4]] energy dégâts and gains 1 slowed niveau jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour. If a creature would be targeted by more than one of these sentries, it only makes this jet de sauvegarde once, taking an additional [[/r d4]] dégâts for each sentry beyond the first.

The sentries have 1 point de vie, an classe d'armure of 10, and can be repaired over the course of a repos long. Each sentry lasts pendant 1 minute before deactivating. You can maintain a number of sentries equal to your Intelligence modificateur. Once a sentry has been activated, it can't be activated again until you finish a short or repos long.

Alternative Fuel.name: Alternative Fuel
Alternative Fuel.description: Toutes les fonctionnalités, manœuvres ou découvertes de votre chef peuvent désormais affecter les droïdes et les constructions.

Integrated EVA Functionality.name: Integrated EVA Functionality
Integrated EVA Functionality.description: Vous effectuez plusieurs ajouts à votre pack de biochimiste modifié, vous êtes protégé des conditions dangereuses, comme si vous portiez une combinaison EVA, aussi longtemps que vous portez votre pack de biochimiste modifié.

Quickened Subroutine.name: Quickened Subroutine
Quickened Subroutine.description:
Prérequis : niveau 5

Lorsque vous lancez un pouvoir qui a un temps d'incantation de 1 action, vous pouvez dépenser 2 points technologiques supplémentaires pour changer le temps d'incantation en 1 bonus d'action pour ce lancement.

Vous ne pouvez utiliser qu'une seule modification de sous-programme sur un pouvoir lorsque vous le lancez, sauf indication contraire.

Archive Research.name: Archive Research
Archive Research.description: Vos expéditions ont permis de recueillir une multitude de connaissances sur la force. Vous apprenez trois pouvoirs de la Forces de votre choix à volonté, qui ne comptent pas dans votre nombre de pouvoir de la Forces connu.

Rancor's Discipline.name: Rancor's Discipline
Rancor's Discipline.description: Vous pouvez remplacer la Sagesse ou le Charisme (choisis lorsque vous étudiez cette discipline) par l'Intelligence pour les fonctionnalités de votre classe d'érudit, à l'exception des autres découvertes et des fonctionnalités de poursuite académique.

Ideal of the Contender.name: Idéal du concurrent
Ideal of the Contender.description:
Your unarmed strike dégâts increases by one step (from 1 to [[/r d4]], [[/r d4]] to [[/r d6]], or [[/r d6]] to [[/r d8]]), and your unarmed strikes gain the finesse property.

De plus, as a action bonus, you can manifest this ideal in a brief surge of energy. For the next minute, your unarmed strikes count as enhanced for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to unenhanced attacks and dégâts, and you can use your Wisdom or Charisma modificateur (your choice) instead of Strength for checks made to grapple a target or escape a grapple.

Amplifying Barrel.name: Amplifying Barrel
Amplifying Barrel.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 5, Blaster

You gain a +1 bonus to jet de dégâtss made with this weapon. This bonus increases to +2 at niveau 9 and +3 at niveau 13.

Advanced Brightsaber.name: Advanced Brightsaber
Advanced Brightsaber.description:
Prérequis : niveau 15, Prototype Brightsaber

Vous peaufinez davantage votre sabre lumineux. Lorsqu'elle est activée, la lumière vive de votre sabre laser modifié dissipe désormais automatiquement les illusions et peut détecter l'invisibilité, comme avec la vision vraie.

De plus, lorsque vous activez cette conversion pour modificateur les propriétés de votre arme légère et utiliser un bonus d'action pour tenter d'aveugler votre cible, le jet de sauvegarde devient désavantageux.

Restful Melody.name: Restful Melody
Restful Melody.description:
Au cours d'un terrain de repos, vous pouvez jouer une chanson rajeunissante pour aider à la récupération de vos alliés. Si vous ou toute créature amie qui peut entendre votre performance regagnez des points de vie à la fin du terrain de repos, chacune de ces créatures regagne [[/r 1d6]] points de vie supplémentaires.

Les points de vie supplémentaires augmentent lorsque vous atteignez certains niveaux dans cette classe : à [[/r 1d8]] au niveau 9, à 1d 10 au niveau 13 et à [[/r 1d12]] au niveau 17.

Advanced Cryo Amplifier.name: Advanced Cryo Amplifier
Advanced Cryo Amplifier.description:
Prerequisite: niveau 15, Prototype Cryo Amplifier

You further fine tune your Cryo Amplifier. When you activate this amplifier, la créature is entravé jusqu'à la fin de votre prochain tour.
